summary: A fair‑sounding soundboard fragment that captures an intimate acoustic set and a fiery Not Fade Away, but missing portions make the show feel odd.
review: The recording is a soundboard capture with a slightly muddy mix, hum between tracks and occasional mic distortion on Pigpen’s organ, yet the acoustic numbers shine through with clear detail.  Highlights include Little Sadie, Seasons of My Heart, High Time, Not Fade Away and a spirited Me & My Uncle, while the abrupt cut on Mason’s leaves the set feeling incomplete.  Overall listeners enjoy the performance despite the uneven mix and missing material.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praise the musical moments (acoustic set, NFA, standout songs) while noting significant recording flaws and that the tape is only a fragment of the full concert.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Slightly muddy overall; noticeable hum between songs; occasional distortion on Pigpen's mic; low organ level in the mix; Mason’s cuts out mid‑verse; uneven stereo/mono balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The tape appears to be the middle segment of a longer show – electric opening, a brief intimate acoustic set, then back to electric.  Missing material before and after makes the flow feel disjointed, but the songs that are present play well together.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His tone is described as gnarly (SG vs sunburst Strat) and he trades licks with Pigpen in the NFA; a broken string forces a brief pause during Me & My Uncle.
band_member_comments.Phil: Drives the ‘train’ on Not Fade Away with prominent bass work, especially noted in the unevenly mixed recording.
band_member_comments.Bob: Delivers a solo on Me & My Uncle and provides vocal jokes; praised for his organ presence despite being low in the mix elsewhere.
band_member_comments.Keys: Pigpen’s organ is audible but generally low; reviewers note occasional distortion on his mic and that this show gives him a louder spot than usual.
